testcase.system-out: 02:04:40.425 [main] INFO com.graph.benchmark.GraphBenchmarkEngine -- === runFullGraphSuite: V=200 seed=42 runs=5 === 02:04:40.429 [main] INFO testcase.name: runFullGraphSuite_returns8Results

testcase.name: benchmarkMST_timingsPositive

testcase.name: benchmarkMST_complete_resultNotNull
